query_normalized: imaginative perception tokens enhance spatial reasoning in multimodal language models computer science
rationale: This paper does not satisfy any inclusion criteria (a-f) because it measures general logical reasoning capabilities rather than the specific dependent variable (spatial reasoning) or the specific independent variable (Imaginative Perception Tokens) the user is studying. While it operates on the same domain (MLLMs), it is a benchmark paper for logical reasoning evaluation, not a study of the token mechanism or spatial reasoning enhancement that forms the core of the user's research question.
